workQueue.searchPlaceholder: Search by job, part, operation, or customer...
workQueue.empty: Nothing on your queue right now
workQueue.noCellsDescription: Add manufacturing cells in admin settings to see the kanban board.
workQueue.selectPrompt: Tap an operation to see details, start a timer, or report an issue.

instructions.title: Cell instructions
instructions.fallbackHint: Use routing steps as the fallback operator guide.
instructions.missingBody: No operator instructions for this cell — follow the routing steps.

terminal.youAreClockedOn: You are currently clocked on this operation

assembly.title: Assembly Dependencies
assembly.warningDesc: Some components are not yet complete

flowProgress.cannotProceed: Cannot proceed - next cell at capacity

batchFlow.title: Batch {{batchNumber}} detected
batchFlow.description: This operation belongs to batch {{batchNumber}}. Choose whether to run this operation alone or process the full batch.
batchFlow.descriptionWithSheet: This operation belongs to batch {{batchNumber}} on sheet {{sheetNumber}}. Choose whether to run this operation alone or process the full batch.
batchFlow.chooseMode: Choose single operation or full batch before starting.

unavailable.closed: This batch is already closed, so full-batch scanning is unavailable.
unavailable.partial: Some batch members already started or finished. Full-batch scanning is disabled to avoid partial batch conflicts.
unavailable.active_elsewhere: Another operator is already active on part of this batch. Finish or stop that work before running the full batch.
unavailable.completed_members: Some batch members are already completed. Continue with a single operation instead.

errors.no_match: Scanned {{token}}, but no matching operation is available in this tenant.
errors.duplicate_match: Scanned {{token}}, but it matches {{count}} operations. Use a more specific token.
errors.closed: Scanned {{token}}, but {{operation}} is already closed or completed.
errors.active_by_other_operator: Scanned {{token}}, but {{operation}} is already active for {{operator}}.

workModes.title: Operator state
workModes.description: Keep setup/prep separate from production and show what can start right now.

errors.selectMode: Select setup/prep or production before starting work.
errors.outsideWorkingHours: This tenant only allows terminal work during configured working hours.
errors.setupRequired: Production is blocked until setup/prep has been recorded for this operation.
errors.setupDisabled: Setup/prep mode is disabled for this tenant.

terminal.capacityBlocked: Cannot complete because the next cell is at capacity.
terminal.otherOperatorClocked: Another operator is still clocked on this operation.
terminal.noJobSelectedDescription: Select a job from the list to view details and controls.
terminal.noOperationsFound: No routing steps found for this part.

batchPanel.intro: This operation runs as part of a batch — it moves through production together with the other parts on it.

terminal.stopBeforeComplete: Pause active timing before completing the operation.

production.shortfallPrompt: {{count}} short of target. File an issue?
production.cadProcessingFailed: CAD processing failed. Using fallback viewer.
production.openOperationForIssue: Open the operation to report an issue
production.selectScrapReason: Select a reason for each scrap entry

terminalLogin.employeeIdHint: Scan your badge or type your ID below
terminalLogin.invalidCredentials: Invalid employee ID or PIN. Please try again.
terminalLogin.loginFailed: Login failed. Please contact your supervisor.
terminalLogin.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
terminalLogin.helpText: Need help? Contact your supervisor or the IT department.
terminalLogin.authRequiredDesc: Please log in with your terminal account to access the shop floor.
terminalLogin.reverifyHint: Re-enter the current operator PIN to unlock this shared device
terminalLogin.idleTimeoutLocked: This shared terminal locked after inactivity. Re-enter the operator PIN to continue.
terminalLogin.sessionExpiredLocked: This shared terminal requires operator re-verification before work can continue.

operatorView.selectJobToStart: Select a job to start working

mobile.biometricReason: Confirm operator to unlock the work queue.
mobile.scanFailed: Scanner failed. Enter the code manually.
mobile.scanHint: Hold the device steady and centre the code in view.
mobile.scanNoResult: No code detected. Try again or enter it manually.
mobile.scannerUnavailable: Live scanning runs in the Eryxon iOS and Android apps. Enter the code below.
mobile.signInBody: Tap your employee badge or type it in to load your work queue.

scanner.available: Point the camera at a printed QR or barcode. Eryxon will jump straight to the matching operation.
scanner.fallback: Camera scanning runs in the native iOS and Android apps. Type a code below to continue.
scanner.permissionDenied: Enable camera access in your device settings to scan
scanner.title: Scan a job, part, or operation
scanner.unavailable: Camera scanning is only available in the native iOS and Android apps

substepToasts.templateNotFound: Template not found or has no items
